name: HWR_RECOGNITION_B
description: The recognition table stores global profile recognition data.

columns.Name: RECOGNITION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the recognition table.

columns.Name: RECOGNITION_TEXT
columns.Comments: This is the full text of the recognition.

columns.Name: RECOGNITION_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the date of the recognition.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the unique Id of the recommender.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDER_GBL_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the global profile ID of the recommender.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDER_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the name of the recommender.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDER_TITLE
columns.Comments: This is the title of the recommender.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDER_EMAIL
columns.Comments: This is the list of email addresses of the recommender.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDER_RELATION
columns.Comments: This is the relation type of the recommender.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDER_IMAGE_URL
columns.Comments: This is the image URL of the recommender.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
